title: MySecretMods
description: Fabric 1.21.10 mod that prevents servers from detecting your mods.
body:
# MySecretMods

## Attention ⚠️
I do NOT recommend anyone to use this mod anymore. I have been banned from Cytooxien.net (main development purpose). I recommend using this new and improved mod https://modrinth.com/mod/exploitpreventer.

**MySecretMods** is a Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.10** that helps you keep your installed client-side mods private from server detection.

## What it does
- Prevents servers from detecting which client-side mods you have installed.
- Stops resolving non-vanilla keybinds and translation keys in signs, written books and anvils.
- Certain servers send packets in order to see if the client resolves these keys.
- Works seamlessly in the background without affecting gameplay.
- Compatible with **all** Fabric mods.

## Why you should use it
- Protects your privacy when playing on servers that allow client-side mods.
- Lets you enjoy your favorite mods without revealing your mod list to servers.
- Simple to use

## Important Information ⚠️
This mod is intended for use only on servers where client-side mods are permitted.  
Always respect server rules and use this mod responsibly.

## License
This project is licensed under the **MIT License**.  
Some code is inspired by [ModDetectionPreventer](https://github.com/JustAlittleWolf/ModDetectionPreventer) by JustAlittleWolf.
